metadata.name: John
metadata.description: Kompaktes Interlinear-Artefakt fuer Matthaeus, Markus, Lukas und Johannes. Pro Vers werden die OpenGNT-Worttokens mit Lemma, Morphologie, Strong, Transliteration und knappen Glossen bereitgestellt.

1:20.st: He did not refuse to confess

2:19.st: I will raise it up again

2:20.st: are going to raise it up

6:27.st: has placed His seal of approval.”

7:37.st: called out in a loud voice

10:21.g: of one possessed by a demon.
10:21.lt: of one possessed by a demon.
10:21.st: of [a man] possessed by a demon.

10:24.st: will You keep us in suspense

12:19.st: this is doing you no good

13:30.st: As soon as he had received

14:29.g: it shall have come to pass,
14:29.lt: it shall have come to pass,

15:22.st: they would not be guilty of sin

15:24.st: they would not be guilty of sin

18:30.st: we would not have handed Him over

21:18.st: you do not want to go.”
